name: Twenty
short_desc: Open-source, self-hostable CRM built as a modern alternative to Salesforce.
author: twentyhq
description: Twenty is an open-source CRM designed as a modern, self-hostable alternative to Salesforce. It offers a customisable data model, Kanban and table views, task and note management, and a plugin-friendly architecture. This package bundles the Twenty server, background worker, Postgres 16, and Redis so the app is fully self-contained.

form_fields.label: App Secret
form_fields.hint: Auto-generated session / token-signing secret. Rotating it invalidates all existing sessions.

form_fields.label: Postgres Password
form_fields.hint: Auto-generated on first install and used for the bundled Postgres role.
